intro: Adenandra speciosa, also known as the showy Adenandra, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae. The showy Adenandra is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which can help alleviate various ailments such as digestive issues and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Adenandra speciosa include flavonoids, limonoids, and coumarins, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Adenandra speciosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
